title: Vehicular Mastery
wikitext:
[[File:Eleanor.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Vehicular Mastery''' pertains to characters that have extreme skill piloting/driving various types of transport, including both civilian and custom vehicles.

==Possible Uses==
*'''Land Vehicles:''' The ability to have mastered transport whilst driving on roads, rough terrain, and in vehicles such as: Cars, bikes, trucks and tanks
*'''Air Vehicles:''' The ability to pilot aircraft and are able to push it to its limits. This includes aircraft such as planes and helicopters
*'''Seaborne Vehicles:''' The ability to be able to drive: Boats, submarines, and even ships with little difficulty.
*'''Space Vehicles:''' The ability to fly and maneuver ships/shuttles through dangerous hazards and be able to handle difficult situations.

==Users==
*[[The Agent]] (Crackdown)
*[[Samus Aran (Legendary Suit)|Samus Aran]] ([[Metroid (Verse)|Metroid]])
*[[Simon the Digger]] ([[Gurren Lagann (Verse)|Gurren Lagann]])
*[[Dr. Eggman (Game)|Dr. Eggman Robotnik]] ([[Sonic the Hedgehog (Main Continuity)|Sonic the Hedgehog]])
